channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 31st May
item.description:
This has now become a weekly occurrence. The bin regularly overflows with rubbish and bags of dog waste, creating an ongoing problem for residents. As a result, foxes are frequently tearing open the bags and scattering their contents across the surrounding area. The resulting mess is unsightly, unhygienic, and poses a potential public health risk. To address this issue, I urge the council to install additional dog waste bins and replace the existing bin with a fox-proof, secure unit. Without these measures, the problem will continue to recur, creating unnecessary environmental and health concerns for the local community. I would appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Wood Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches trashed by private property on Wilman grove, 31st May
item.description:
New neighbour from 20 rochford walk has abandoned garden waste on the street, far from any trash bin, by the wall of a private property. This has been there for weeks, they’re refusing to take care of it and it’s creating nest for bugs ants and mice

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochford Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights not working, 31st May
item.description:
Works of SGN gas.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overspilling dog poo bin, 31st May
item.description:
I requested Medivet to empty this dog poo bin on Friday. It had not been done. It is a health hazard. Please do something.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Chestnut Close, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan parked on residential road, 31st May
item.description:
There's a caravan parked It is illegal to park or store a static caravan on a public road, it exceed standard vehicle dimensions to be parked there, its also an obstruction as cars turning in this road can not see around it. Car parked outside 1a Elm Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Football frame dumped, 31st May
item.description:
Football net frame dumped On the corner between sudbury crescent and keedonwood.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudbury Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 31st May
item.description:
Outside 367 Long Lane under a car there is a fox that has died.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty park, 31st May
item.description:
The children’s park, play area is really dirty. It needs a good sweep. It’s full of debris from tree etc. This park has not been swept in weeks!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warham Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public bins overflowing AGAIN at Bus stop on Southend Road north of Copers Cope Road,, 31st May
item.description:
Public bins overflowing AGAIN at Bus stop on Southend Road north of Copers Cope Road, these bins need regular (daily) emptying
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Massive fly tipping, 31st May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped and not cleared. Attracted more fly tipping, van dropped large builders bags.

item.title: Street light blocked, 31st May
item.description:
Station Estate is pitch black at night because the light is blocked by the trees.

item.title: Litter and boxes, 31st May
item.description:
Horton road has lots of litter all along it at the moment and some rubbish bags and boxes dumped on the pavement outside no 6 and no 9. Does this road get cleaned regularly or only when someone reports a problem?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost hit, 31st May
item.description:
The lamppost has been hot and concrete cracked risk of it falling into a house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Calvin Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubish dumped by 23 pioneer street, 31st May
item.description:
23 pioneer street had thier garden tidy-up but man who did work left all rubish by the tree making the street look like a dump and it's not the first time ethier they belive the area next to thier house is a public dump this needs to stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pioneer Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal advertising on junction box outside Bolton House on Trafalgar Road, 31st May
item.description:
Illegal advertising on junction box outside Bolton House on Trafalgar Road. Great if you can remove. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
